message:
Expand history command and improve error rendering

- Add new history subcommands and filtering options
- Improve error rendering with better formatting
- Add provider-specific enhancements for Claude and Codex
- Expand E2E test coverage for history features
- Update beads tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

     usage: Option<ClaudeUsage>,
